title: Repo Rust Control Plane
description: Repository-specific guidance for Wave state reducers, queue/read-model projections, closure coverage, and event-shaped status surfaces.

activation.when: Attach when work changes planning status, queueing, traceable state, or operator-facing control-plane projections.

termination: Stop when authoritative control-plane state is explicit, serializable, and reflected consistently across CLI and TUI surfaces.
